topics.title: Writing Workflows
topics.description: YAML schema, DAG execution, dependencies, parallelization, inputs, outputs, validation, and cleanup policies.

topics.title: Template Variables
topics.description: Variable syntax, resolution order, default filter, escape sequences, and available built-in variables.

topics.title: Loops
topics.description: Loop configuration, built-in and custom evaluators, iteration control, and review-fix patterns.

topics.title: Providers
topics.description: Built-in providers, custom CLI agents such as Copilot/Codex, configuration options, and execution behavior.

topics.title: Custom CLI Agents
topics.description: Defining custom providers in config.yml to integrate any CLI tool into workflows.

topics.title: Interactive Nodes
topics.description: Session mode (tmux) and prompt mode for human-in-the-loop workflows.

topics.title: Nested Workflows
topics.description: Composing workflows by referencing child workflows from parent nodes.

topics.title: Run Management
topics.description: Listing, inspecting, resuming, cancelling, and cleaning up workflow runs.

topics.title: Packaging Workflows
topics.description: Bundling a workflow and its referenced files into a .orc-workflow archive with orc pack and orc install.
